workloads.prompt: In two sentences, explain why reproducible measurements matter.
A service handles 120 requests per minute and routing adds 40 milliseconds per request. Explain which measurements are needed before deciding whether the routing cost is operationally important.

Read this policy: repository files define executable truth; durable notes explain intent and history; generated evidence requires review before becoming policy. Summarize the precedence and explain how to resolve disagreement without changing any files.
Shared prefix: evaluate local model serving with fixed prompts, serial requests, measured medians, explicit failures, and immutable evidence. First pass: list the required controls.
Shared prefix: evaluate local model serving with fixed prompts, serial requests, measured medians, explicit failures, and immutable evidence. Reuse pass: explain why each control matters.
